sharc
Documentation développeur
process_results.py
1 import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
2 import sys
3 import os
4 import config
5 from io_utils import get_files_by_extension
6 from io_utils import ireplace
7 from io_utils import get_element_in_xml
8 from io_utils import get_all_elements_in_xml
9 from html_utils import create_main_page
10 from html_utils import write_a_html_page
11 from html_utils import create_result_page_header
12 from html_utils import create_a_title
13 from html_utils import create_a_link
14 from html_utils import create_a_table_header
15 from html_utils import copy_sortable_script
16 
17 class TestCase :
18  def __init__(self, filename, case, nb_proc, solver_name, package, max_it, tol, solver, precond, init_time, calls, success, error, iterations, solve_time, total_time):
19  self.filenamefilename = filename
20  self.casecase = case
21  self.nb_procnb_proc = nb_proc
22  self.solver_namesolver_name = solver_name
23  self.packagepackage = package
24  self.max_itmax_it = max_it
25  self.toltol = tol
26  self.solversolver = solver
27  self.precondprecond = precond
28  self.init_timeinit_time = init_time
29  self.callscalls = calls
30  self.successsuccess = success
31  self.errorerror = error
32  self.iterationsiterations = iterations
33  self.solve_timesolve_time = solve_time
34  self.total_timetotal_time = total_time
35 
36  def __repr__(self):
37  return 'Filename: %s, Case: %s, nb_proc: %s, solver_name: %s, package: %s, max_it: %s, tol: %s, solver: %s, precond: %s, init_time: %s, calls: %s, success: %s, error: %s, iterations: %s, solve_time: %s, total_time: %s' % (self.filenamefilename, self.casecase, self.nb_procnb_proc, self.solver_namesolver_name, self.packagepackage, self.max_itmax_it, self.toltol, self.solversolver, self.precondprecond, self.init_timeinit_time, self.callscalls, self.successsuccess, self.errorerror, self.iterationsiterations, self.solve_timesolve_time, self.total_timetotal_time)
38 
39 def table_header_for_a_test():
40  return ['package', 'solver', 'precond', 'nb_proc', 'success', 'error', 'iterations', 'init_time', 'solve_time', 'total_time']
41 
42 def create_results_for_one_test(test_case, results_list):
43  html, body = create_result_page_header()
44  h1 = create_a_title('h1', os.path.splitext(test_case)[0])
45  body.append(h1)
46  solvers_for_that_case = set()
47  for result in results_list:
48  if result.case == test_case:
49  solvers_for_that_case.add(result.solver_name)
50  for solver_name in solvers_for_that_case:
51  h2 = create_a_title('h2', solver_name)
52  h1.append(h2)
53  tbody = create_a_table_header(h2, table_header_for_a_test())
54  for result in results_list:
55  if result.case == test_case and result.solver_name == solver_name:
56  if not 'original' in result.filename:
57  if result.success == '1':
58  tr = ET.Element('tr', attrib={ 'style': 'background-color:#00b300;color:#ffffff;' })
59  else: #result.success == 0
60  tr = ET.Element('tr', attrib={ 'style': 'background-color:#b30000;color:#ffffff;' })
61  tbody.append(tr)
62  for value in table_header_for_a_test():
63  td = ET.Element('td')
64  td.text = getattr(result, value)
65  tr.append(td)
66  else: #original test case
67  tr = ET.Element('tr' , attrib={ 'style': 'background-color:#b3b3b3;color:#ffffff;' })
68  tbody.append(tr)
69  for value in table_header_for_a_test():
70  td = ET.Element('td')
71  td.text = getattr(result, value)
72  tr.append(td)
73  return html
74 
75 def table_header_for_a_solver():
76  return ['case', 'package', 'solver', 'precond', 'nb_proc', 'success', 'error', 'iterations', 'init_time', 'solve_time', 'total_time']
77 
78 def create_results_for_one_solver(solver, results_list):
79  html, body = create_result_page_header()
80  h1 = create_a_title('h1', solver)
81  body.append(h1)
82  cases_for_that_solver = set()
83  for result in results_list:
84  if result.solver_name == solver:
85  cases_for_that_solver.add(result.solver_name)
86  for case in cases_for_that_solver:
87  tbody = create_a_table_header(h1, table_header_for_a_solver())
88  for result in results_list:
89  if result.solver_name == solver:
90  if not 'original' in result.filename:
91  if result.success == '1':
92  tr = ET.Element('tr', attrib={ 'style': 'background-color:#00b300;color:#ffffff;' })
93  else: #result.success == 0
94  tr = ET.Element('tr', attrib={ 'style': 'background-color:#b30000;color:#ffffff;' })
95  tbody.append(tr)
96  for value in table_header_for_a_solver():
97  td = ET.Element('td')
98  td.text = getattr(result, value)
99  tr.append(td)
100  return html
101 
102 def get_result_list(result_files):
103  results_list = []
104  for file in result_files:
105  if os.path.getsize(file) > 0 and 'coderesult.xml' not in file and 'time_history.xml' not in file:
106  tree = ET.parse(file)
107  root = tree.getroot()
108  test_case = str(get_element_in_xml(root,'input-file').text)
109  test_case = os.path.basename(test_case)
110  nb_proc = get_element_in_xml(root,'nb-proc').text
111  solver = get_element_in_xml(root,'solver')
112  solver_name = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'name').text
113  package = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'package').text
114  max_it = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'max-it').text
115  tol = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'tol').text
116  if get_element_in_xml(solver, 'solver-algo').text is not None:
117  solver_algo = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'solver-algo').text.lower()
118  else:
119  solver_algo = ''
120  if get_element_in_xml(solver, 'precond-algo').text is not None:
121  precond_algo = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'precond-algo').text.lower()
122  else:
123  precond_algo = ''
124  actual_precond_name = str()
125 # if(package.lower() == 'petsc' and precond_algo == 'diag'):
126 # actual_precond_name = precond_algo+'onal'
127  if(package.lower() == 'petsc' and precond_algo == 'hypre-amg'):
128  actual_precond_name = 'hypre'
129 # elif(package.lower() == 'ifpsolver' and precond_algo == 'cpr-amg'):
130 # actual_precond_name = 'cpramg'
131  elif(package.lower() == 'trilinos' and precond_algo == 'riluk'):
132  actual_precond_name = 'iluk'
133  elif(package.lower() == 'trilinos' and precond_algo == 'fast_ilu'):
134  actual_precond_name = 'filu'
135  elif(package.lower() == 'htssolver' and precond_algo == 'chebyshev'):
136  precond_name_position = file.lower().find(precond_algo)
137  if precond_name_position == -1:
138  actual_precond_name = 'poly'
139  else:
140  actual_precond_name = precond_algo
141  else:
142  actual_precond_name = precond_algo
143 
144  precond_name_position = file.lower().find(actual_precond_name)
145 
146  extension_name_position_in_file = file.lower().find('.xml')
147  if 'original' not in test_case:
148  solver_name = file[ precond_name_position + len(actual_precond_name) + 1 : extension_name_position_in_file ]
149  package_name_position = test_case.lower().find(package)
150  extension_name_position = test_case.lower().find('.arc')
151  test_case = test_case[ : package_name_position - 1] + test_case[ extension_name_position :]
152  else:
153  original_position = test_case.lower().find('original')
154  extension_name_position = test_case.lower().find('.arc')
155  test_case = test_case[ : original_position - 1] + test_case[ extension_name_position :]
156  original_position_in_file = file.lower().find('original')
157  solver_name = file[ original_position_in_file + len('original') + 1 : extension_name_position_in_file ]
158  init_time = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'initialisation-time').text
159  solve = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'solve')
160  nb_calls = get_element_in_xml(solve, 'call').text
161  success = get_element_in_xml(solve, 'success').text
162  error = get_element_in_xml(solve, 'error').text
163  iterations = get_element_in_xml(solve, 'iterations').text
164  elapsed_time = get_element_in_xml(solve, 'elapsed-time').text
165  total_time = get_element_in_xml(solver, 'total-time').text
166  results_list.append(TestCase(file, test_case, nb_proc, solver_name, package, max_it, tol, solver_algo, precond_algo, init_time, nb_calls, success, error, iterations, elapsed_time, total_time))
167  return results_list
168 
169 def remove_invalid_results(results_list):
170  new_results_list = [ result for result in results_list if result.iterations != '0' ]
171  return new_results_list
172 
173 def main():
174  os.chdir(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
175  tree = ET.parse(config.config_file)
176  root = tree.getroot()
177 
178  my_input_directory = get_all_elements_in_xml(root, 'output-directory')
179 
180  if not os.path.exists('html'):
181  os.makedirs('html')
182 
183  result_files = get_files_by_extension(my_input_directory, '.xml')
184  results_list = get_result_list(result_files)
185  results_list = remove_invalid_results(results_list)
186 
187  results_list.sort(key=lambda test_case: test_case.case)
188  test_cases = {result.case for result in results_list}
189 
190  if(config.verbose):
191  print('I found ' + str(len(test_cases)) + ' test cases')
192  for test_case in test_cases:
193  print('Case: ' + test_case)
194 
195  test_cases_page = ET.Element('html')
196  test_cases_body = ET.Element('body')
197  test_cases_page.append(test_cases_body)
198  test_cases_div = ET.Element('div', attrib={'class': 'div'})
199  test_cases_body.append(test_cases_div)
200 
201  for test_case in test_cases:
202  write_a_html_page('html/' + os.path.splitext(test_case)[0] + '.html', create_results_for_one_test(test_case, results_list))
203  link = create_a_link(os.path.splitext(test_case)[0] + '.html', os.path.splitext(test_case)[0])
204  p = ET.Element('p')
205  test_cases_div.append(p)
206  p.append(link)
207 
208  test_solvers = {result.solver_name for result in results_list}
209  results_list.sort(key=lambda test_case: test_case.solver_name)
210  solver_cases = {result.solver_name for result in results_list}
211 
212  if(config.verbose):
213  print('I found ' + str(len(solver_cases)) + ' different solvers')
214  for solver in solver_cases:
215  print('Solver: ' + solver)
216 
217  solver_cases_page = ET.Element('html')
218  solver_cases_body = ET.Element('body')
219  solver_cases_page.append(solver_cases_body)
220  solver_cases_div = ET.Element('div', attrib={'class': 'div'})
221  solver_cases_body.append(solver_cases_div)
222 
223  for test_solver in test_solvers:
224  write_a_html_page('html/' + os.path.splitext(test_solver)[0] + '.html', create_results_for_one_solver(test_solver, results_list))
225  link = create_a_link(os.path.splitext(test_solver)[0] + '.html', os.path.splitext(test_solver)[0])
226  p = ET.Element('p')
227  solver_cases_div.append(p)
228  p.append(link)
229 
230  write_a_html_page('html/test_cases.html', test_cases_body)
231  write_a_html_page('html/test_solvers.html', solver_cases_body)
232  write_a_html_page('html/index.html', create_main_page())
233 
234  copy_sortable_script()
235 
236 if __name__ == "__main__":
237  main()
